input_init: h_in0[i] = static_cast<float>(i % 11) - 5.0f; h_in1[i] = static_cast<float>((i * 3 + 1) % 13) - 6.0f; h_in2[i] = static_cast<float>((i * 7 + 2) % 17) - 8.0f; h_in3[i] = static_cast<float>((i * 11 + 3) % 19) - 9.0f;
element_op_code: asc::std::quad_fanout(in0_val, in1_val, in2_val, in3_val, out0_val, out1_val, out2_val, out3_val, out4_val);
